creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
I looked at this problem some time ago and I concluded it wouldn't fix 
anything because npviewer is Linux/i386 binary, not FreeBSD/amd64 
binary.  Luckily nspluginwrapper 1.0.0 was released few days ago (and 
it contains the fix, of course):

http://gwenole.beauchesne.info/en/projects/nspluginwrapper#downloads

So, the best course of action would be to update nspluginwrapper to 
1.0.0.  FYI...

Jung-uk Kim
